title: hesreallyhim/awesome-claude-code
friendlyTitle: A big guide to Claude Code tools
summary: This fast-growing curated list collects Claude Code resources across skills, agents, hooks, plugins, security, observability, memory, cost monitoring, and workflow design.
friendlySummary: This repo collects many useful Claude Code resources in one place, including guides, plugins, skills, and safety tools.
whyItMatters: Teams adopting coding agents can use the list as a practical map of tools, patterns, and safeguards instead of discovering the Claude Code ecosystem one scattered link at a time.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Use it when you want to improve a Claude Code setup or find examples from other developers.
